meta.title: 6 Days Beautiful Kerala + Backwaters Overnight Cruise from Malaysia | Dhesu Travel & Tours
meta.description: 6-day Kerala tour with Kochi, Munnar tea hills and overnight backwater houseboat cruise, private vehicle. From RM1688 per person.
meta.keywords: 6 Days Beautiful Kerala + Backwaters Overnight Cruise from Malaysia, India tour package, Kerala tour package Malaysia, Dhesu travel

hero.title: 6 Days in Kerala.
hero.intro: An extra day turns the Kerala highlights into a properly relaxed holiday. Fort Kochi, Munnar's tea hills, a backwater houseboat night, and time to slow right down in God's Own Country.

breadcrumb.label: 6 Days Beautiful Kerala + Backwaters Overnight Cruise

overview.heading: 6 Days Beautiful Kerala + Backwaters Overnight Cruise: The Full Picture
body: Six days is the sweet spot for Kerala. You get all the essentials, Kochi, Munnar and the backwaters, plus enough breathing room to actually relax rather than rush from stop to stop. This is a holiday as much as a tour.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, this Kerala package centres on an overnight houseboat cruise on the backwaters, with the heritage of Fort Kochi and the tea hills of Munnar around it. Your own vehicle and driver guide keep the pace gentle and flexible throughout.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: Overnight Backwater Cruise
items.body: A private houseboat on the Alleppey or Kumarakom backwaters, with onboard meals and a slow, beautiful night drifting through the canals.

items.title: Munnar Tea Hills
items.body: Cool mountain air, rolling tea estates, waterfalls and viewpoints. Munnar is the green, misty heart of Kerala's hill country.

items.title: Time to Relax
items.body: The extra day means you can slow down, enjoy an Ayurvedic massage, linger over Kerala meals, or simply soak up the scenery without watching the clock.

days.title: Arrive Kochi
days.description: Met at Cochin airport and transferred to your hotel. Evening at the fishing nets.

days.title: Kochi to Munnar
days.description: Scenic drive to the tea hills of Munnar.

days.title: Munnar Sightseeing
days.description: A full day among the tea estates and viewpoints.

days.title: Munnar to Alleppey Houseboat
days.description: Descend to the backwaters and board your private houseboat.

days.title: Backwaters to Kochi
days.description: Morning cruise, then return towards Kochi with time to relax.

days.title: Depart Kochi
days.description: Checkout and transfer to the airport for your onward flight.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level
hotelOptions.subheading: Centrally located hotels with easy access to the main sights. Pick the tier that suits your style.

whyBook.heading: Kerala at the Right Pace
whyBook.body: Six days lets Kerala breathe, and we build in the relaxation that makes the state special, from a quality houseboat to optional Ayurveda. Dhesu has arranged Kerala holidays for over 35 years.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: 6 Day Kerala Tour Package from Malaysia
sections.body:
This 6 day Kerala package is for travellers who want the highlights without the hurry. Kochi, Munnar and the backwaters, with an extra day to slow down and enjoy.

The private vehicle and overnight houseboat make it a relaxed, flexible trip, and there is room for Ayurvedic treatments, leisurely meals and simply soaking up the scenery.

For wildlife and spice plantations too, the 6 day Thekkady and 8 day full Kerala packages add Thekkady to the route.

sections.heading: Ayurveda in Kerala
sections.body:
Kerala is the home of Ayurveda, India's ancient system of natural medicine and wellness. Many hotels and dedicated centres offer treatments, from relaxing massages to full therapeutic programmes.

With six days, there is comfortable time to add an Ayurvedic massage or treatment to your trip. Let us know if you would like wellness built into your itinerary.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Cochin International Airport (COK). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: What is the best time for a 6 day Kerala trip?
items.answer: September to March offers the most pleasant weather across the coast, hills and backwaters. The monsoon brings lush greenery but heavy rain. Munnar stays cool year-round, a refreshing contrast to the warm coast.

items.question: Can I add Ayurvedic treatments?
items.answer: Yes. Kerala is the home of Ayurveda, and the relaxed 6 day pace leaves room for massages or treatments. We can arrange these at your hotel or a dedicated centre. Let us know your interest when booking.

items.question: How is this different from the 5 day Kerala package?
items.answer: The 6 day version covers the same core highlights, Kochi, Munnar and the backwaters, but with an extra day for a more relaxed pace and time to add wellness or leisure. The 8 day packages add Thekkady's wildlife and spice plantations.
